title: phyllanthus bupleuroides var. ngoyensis
intro: Phyllanthus bupleuroides var. ngoyensis is a plant species of the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the Ngoy plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The Ngoy plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
